description: Inject explicitly bound Rabi persona context into individual Codex sessions.

hooks.command: node -e "const path = require('node:path'); const { pathToFileURL } = require('node:url'); import(pathToFileURL(path.join(process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT, 'scripts', 'rabi-codex-hook.mjs')).href).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"

node -e "const path = require('node:path'); const { pathToFileURL } = require('node:url'); import(pathToFileURL(path.join(process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT, 'scripts', 'rabi-codex-hook.mjs')).href).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
